title: Grave Warden
description:
Gain 8 [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description:
Gain 11 [gold]Block[/gold].
Add a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
notes: Generates a Soul card/token into the draw pile. The Soul token type is a unique Necrobinder mechanic that can be configured with special hover information.
